title: Material supply assembly with precise control for additive manufacturing
abstract: A processing machine (10) for building an object (11) from material (12) includes a build platform (28A); a material supply assembly (18) that deposits the material (12) onto the build platform (28A); and an energy system (22) that directs an energy beam (22A) at a portion of the material (12) on the build platform (28A) to form a portion of the object (11). The material supply assembly (18) includes a material container (240) that retains the material (12); and (ii) a flow control assembly (242) that selectively controls a flow characteristic of the material (12) deposited onto the build platform (28A).
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A processing machine for building a three-dimensional object from a material, the processing machine comprising: a build platform; a material supply assembly that deposits the material onto the build platform, the material supply assembly including (i) a material container that retains the material; and (ii) a flow control assembly that controls a flow characteristic of the material deposited onto the build platform; and an energy system that directs an energy beam at a portion of the material on the build platform to form a portion of the object. 2. The processing machine of claim 1 wherein the material supply assembly includes a supply outlet positioned above the build platform, and wherein the flow control assembly controls an effective area of the supply outlet. 3. The processing machine of claim 2 wherein the flow control assembly controls an effective width of the supply outlet. 4. The processing machine of claim 2 wherein the flow control assembly controls at least one of an effective shape and effective size of the supply outlet to correspond to the build platform. 5. The processing machine of claim 2 wherein the flow control assembly controls at least one of an effective shape and effective size of the supply outlet to correspond the object. 6. The processing machine of claim 2 wherein the flow control assembly includes a first shutter and a first shutter mover that selectively moves the first shutter relative to the material container to control the effective area of the supply outlet. 32 7. The processing machine of claim 6 wherein the flow control assembly includes a second shutter and a second shutter mover that selectively moves the second shutter relative to the first shutter to control the effective area of the supply outlet. 8. The processing machine of claim 1 wherein the flow control assembly controls the flow characteristic to correspond to a shape of the build platform. 9. The processing machine of claim 1 wherein the flow control assembly controls the flow characteristic to correspond to a shape of the object. 10. The processing machine of any one of claims 1 -9 further comprising a mover assembly that moves the build platform relative to the material supply assembly. 11. The processing machine of any one of claims 1 -9 further comprising a mover assembly that rotates the build platform relative to the material supply assembly. 12. The processing machine of claim 1 1 wherein the flow control assembly controls an effective width of the supply outlet. 13. The processing machine of claim 12 wherein the flow control assembly selectively controls an effective central axis of the supply outlet based on a position of the build platform relative to the supply outlet. 14. The processing machine of claim 12 wherein the flow control assembly controls an effective central axis of the supply outlet based on a design of the object. 15. A method for building a three-dimensional object from a material comprising: providing a build platform; 33 

 depositing the material onto the build platform with a material supply assembly that includes (i) a material container that retains the material; and (ii) a flow control assembly that controls a flow characteristic of the material deposited onto the build platform; and directing an energy beam at a portion of the material on the build platform to form a portion of the object. 16. The method of claim 15 wherein depositing includes controlling an effective area of a supply outlet that is positioned over the build platform. 17. The method of claim 16 wherein depositing includes controlling an effective width of the supply outlet. 18. The method of claim 16 wherein depositing includes controlling at least one of an effective shape and an effective size of the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the build platform. 19. The method of claim 16 wherein depositing includes controlling at least one of an effective shape and an effective size of the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the object. 20. The method of claim 16 wherein depositing includes selectively moving a first shutter relative to the material container to selectively control the effective shape of the supply outlet. 21. The method of claim 20 wherein depositing includes selectively moving a second shutter relative to the material container to selectively control the effective area of the supply outlet. 22. The method of claim 15 wherein depositing includes controlling the flow characteristic to correspond to the build platform. 23. The method of claim 15 wherein depositing includes controlling the flow characteristic to correspond to the object. 24. The method of claim 15 further comprising moving the build platform relative to the material supply assembly with a mover assembly. 25. The method of claim 15 further comprising rotating the build platform relative to the material supply assembly with a mover assembly. 26. A processing machine for building a three-dimensional object from a powder material, the processing machine comprising: a build platform; a material supply assembly that deposits the powder material to a selected area on the build platform; and an energy system that directs an energy beam at a portion of the powder material on the build platform to form a portion of the object. 27. The processing machine of claim 26, wherein the material supply assembly includes a material container that retains the powder material having a supply outlet through which the powder material being supplied onto the build platform, and wherein the material supply assembly includes a flow control assembly that controls an effective area of the supply outlet to deposit the powder material onto the selected area on the build platform. 28. The processing machine of claim 27, wherein the build platform and the material supply assembly are configured to move relative to each other in a first direction, and wherein the supply outlet has a rectangular shape having a long side intersecting to the first direction. 29. The processing machine of claim 28, wherein the flow control assembly is configured to control an effective width which is an opening size in the long side of the supply outlet. 30. The processing machine of claim 28 or 29, wherein the flow control assembly is configured to control an effective width which is an opening size in the short side of the supply outlet. 31. The processing machine of claim 29 or 30, wherein the flow control assembly includes a shutter assembly provided at the supply outlet configured to change of the effective width of the supply outlet. 32. The processing machine of any one of claims 29 to 31 , wherein the flow control assembly changes the effective width according to the relative movement of the build platform and the material supply assembly. 33. The processing machine of any one of claims 29 to 32, wherein the flow control assembly changes the effective width according to position of the build platform relative to the material supply assembly. 34. The processing machine of any one of claim 27 to 33, wherein the flow control assembly is configure to control the size of the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the build platform. 36 35. The processing machine of any one of claims 27 to 34, wherein the flow control assembly is configured to control the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the object. 36. The processing machine of any one of claims 27 to 35, wherein the flow control assembly includes an activation system which activates the material supply assembly to start depositing the powder material. 37. The processing machine of claim 36, wherein the activation system includes at least one vibration generator provided at the material container. 38. The processing machine of claim 36, wherein the flow control assembly controls depositing the powder material onto the selected area of the build platform by cooperating the supply outlet and the activation system. 39. The processing machine of claim 37, wherein the activation system includes plurality of vibration generators, and wherein the flow control assembly activates at least part of vibrators selectively in cooperation with the supply outlet. 40. A method for building a three-dimensional object from a material comprising: providing a build platform; depositing the powder material to a selected area on the build platform with a material supply assembly; and directing an energy beam at a portion of the powder material on the build platform with an energy system to form a portion of the object. 37 41 . The method of claim 40 wherein depositing includes the material supply assembly having a material container that retains the powder material having a supply outlet through which the powder material being supplied onto the build platform, and controlling an effective area of the supply outlet with a flow control assembly to deposit the powder material onto the selected area on the build platform. 42. The method of claim 41 , wherein the build platform and the material supply assembly are configured to move relative to each other in a first direction, and wherein depositing includes the supply outlet having a rectangular shape having a long side intersecting to the first direction. 43. The method of claim 42, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly being configured to control an effective width which is an opening size in the long side of the supply outlet. 44. The method of claim 42 or 43, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly being configured to control an effective width which is an opening size in the short side of the supply outlet. 45. The method of claim 42 or 43, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly having a shutter assembly provided at the supply outlet configured to change of the effective width of the supply outlet. 46. The method of any one of claims 43 to 45, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly changing the effective width according to the relative movement of the build platform and the material supply assembly. 47. The method of any one of claims 43 to 46, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly changing the effective width according to position of the build platform relative to the material supply assembly. 38 48. The method of any one of claim 41 to 47, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly controlling the size of the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the build platform. 49. The method of any one of claims 41 to 48, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly controlling the supply outlet to correspond to a shape of the object. 50. The method of any one of claims 41 to 49, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly having an activation system which activates the material supply assembly to start depositing the powder material. 51 . The method of claim 50, wherein the activation system includes at least one vibration generator provided at the material container. 52. The method of claim 50, wherein depositing includes the flow control assembly depositing the powder material onto the selected area of the build platform by cooperating the supply outlet and the activation system. 53. The method of claim 51 , wherein the activation system includes plurality of vibration generators, and wherein depositing includes activating at least part of vibrators selectively in cooperation with the supply outlet. 39
